metadata.title: Theo Stracke | Software Developer
metadata.description: Theo Stracke's Portfolio. Front-End Developer with Full Stack expertise in creating high-performance web solutions.

hero.title: THEO STRACKE.
hero.subtitle: Front-End Developer specialized in the React and Next.js ecosystem. I build scalable, high-performance interfaces, backed by a solid foundation in Node.js and relational databases.

aboutCard.description: I transform complex problems into fast, accessible digital products. My background in enterprise technical support taught me to foresee structural failures before they reach production. My focus is on delivering complete solutions, connecting a robust database architecture to the best possible user experience on the interface.
points: Mastery of the React and Next.js ecosystem
Scalable architecture and focus on performance

about.title: About
about.beat1: I transform complex problems into fast and accessible digital products.
about.beat2: My background in enterprise technical support taught me to anticipate structural failures before they reach production.
about.beat3: I do not just write code - I deeply understand product rules to propose efficient solutions.
about.beat4: From database to interface, I can work confidently across the entire delivery pipeline.
about.description: My goal is to deliver software that generates real business impact. I don't just write code; I strive to deeply understand product rules to propose technically efficient solutions. My experience in highly demanding corporate environments, combined with my Full Stack work using tools like Node.js, Prisma, and PostgreSQL, allows me to operate confidently across the entire development pipeline. I value clean code, smart componentization, and interfaces designed for high scalability.
highlights: Advanced development with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Building RESTful APIs and data modeling
Critical product vision shaped in enterprise environments

items.details: I lead the development and maintenance of web applications essential to operations. I was directly responsible for the conceptualization and implementation of SisCeD, a digital certificate and scheduling management platform that optimized processes and drastically reduced the operational time of the administrative sector. I also work on the frontline of analysis and resolution of technical incidents in production.

Provided specialized technical support to high-level clients resolving incidents in corporate reporting systems. This role honed my analytical ability to track complex data flows, diagnose bottlenecks in production, and collaborate with multidisciplinary teams guided by agile methodologies.
Period of intense development focused on resilience, leadership, and the ability to execute and make decisions under pressure in a highly rigorous technical and disciplinary environment.

army.intro: Night operation engaged. Find the three markers to reveal this chapter of my journey.
army.target1: Mar/2024: service begins with immersion in a high-discipline environment.
army.target2: During the cycle: leadership, execution under pressure, and teamwork were reinforced.
army.target3: Jan/2025: end of cycle with stronger resilience, focus, and decision-making.
army.complete: Mission complete. Proceed to the next chapter.

thomson.instruction: Conecte os nós para descriptografar os relatórios.

cards.card1: Atendimento técnico especializado em incidentes corporativos complexos.
cards.card2: Análise analítica para rastreamento profundo de fluxos de dados.
cards.card3: Colaboração guiada por metodologias ágeis em ambientes de alta pressão.

items.title: DespaFácil
items.description: Digital dispatch platform designed for scalability and efficiency. It features a multi-flow administrative panel and JWT-based security. The Front-End was built to be highly responsive, consuming a robust REST API managed via Supabase.

items.title: SisCeD
items.description: Scheduling and digital certificate management system developed end-to-end for Rede Vellum. The application modernized internal workflows, ensuring security in data processing and considerably cutting the time required for administrative tasks.
